mapper.sql: id, shijian, height, weight, bmi, zuoyanshili, youyanshili, feihuoliang, lidingtiaoyuan, yibaimi, xyyiliaoyh, xyyiliaoyhid, zongfen, zuoweitiqianqu, yintixiangshang, wushimi, yiqianmi
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_jiankangdangan
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_jiankangdangan
id,
shijian,
height,
weight,
bmi,
zuoyanshili,
youyanshili,
feihuoliang,
lidingtiaoyuan,
yibaimi,
xyyiliaoyh,
xyyiliaoyhid,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{shijian,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{zuoyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{youyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{feihuoliang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lidingtiaoyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{yibaimi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_jiankangdangan
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
shijian = #{record.shijian,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
height = #{record.height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bmi = #{record.bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zuoyanshili = #{record.zuoyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
youyanshili = #{record.youyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feihuoliang = #{record.feihuoliang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lidingtiaoyuan = #{record.lidingtiaoyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yibaimi = #{record.yibaimi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xyyiliaoyh = #{record.xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xyyiliaoyhid = #{record.xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update t_jiankangdangan set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, shijian = #{record.shijian,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, height = #{record.height,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bmi = #{record.bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zuoyanshili = #{record.zuoyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, youyanshili = #{record.youyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feihuoliang = #{record.feihuoliang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lidingtiaoyuan = #{record.lidingtiaoyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yibaimi = #{record.yibaimi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xyyiliaoyh = #{record.xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xyyiliaoyhid = #{record.xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_jiankangdangan
shijian = #{shijian,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
height = #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bmi = #{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zuoyanshili = #{zuoyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
youyanshili = #{youyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feihuoliang = #{feihuoliang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
lidingtiaoyuan = #{lidingtiaoyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
yibaimi = #{yibaimi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xyyiliaoyh = #{xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
xyyiliaoyhid = #{xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_jiankangdangan set shijian = #{shijian,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, height = #{height,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bmi = #{bmi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zuoyanshili = #{zuoyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, youyanshili = #{youyanshili,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feihuoliang = #{feihuoliang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lidingtiaoyuan = #{lidingtiaoyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, yibaimi = #{yibaimi,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zongfen = #{zongfen}, zuoweitiqianqu = #{zuoweitiqianqu}, yintixiangshang = #{yintixiangshang}, wushimi = #{wushimi}, yiqianmi = #{yiqianmi}, xyyiliaoyh = #{xyyiliaoyh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, xyyiliaoyhid = #{xyyiliaoyhid,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
